scan_linter_check.description: By default the contents of user-provided parameters is returned in its raw form by Glide API functions. No checks or validation is applied through low-level API functions like RP.getParameterValue(). Any user-provided data may be malicious and may contain payloads of attacks attempting to exploit vulnerabilities in downstream code. To reduce the likelihood of adding an exploitable vulnerability, every incomming parameter data should be checked. To achieve this, low-level API functions that return raw parameter values should not be used directly in the code. Instead the DevTools function GetParam() should be used. The GetParam() function accepts a validation function to be used to validate the parameter contents.
scan_linter_check.name: CodeSanity - Check external parameters
scan_linter_check.resolution_details: Replace all direct use of low-level Glide API functions that return parameter values by using x_snc_devtools.GetParam() and provide a fit-for-purpose validation function. This includes replacing uses of "RP.getParameterValue", "gs.action.getGlideURI" and "request.queryParams".
